meta.note: Single source of truth for autofill. PII — gitignored. Edit freely.

education.school: Rutgers University Honors College, School of Arts and Sciences

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern, TDAV Team
bullets: Built an AI text and voice agent processing insurance claims for clients and 12,000 customer-service reps on AWS.
Assembled a 13,000-document company knowledge base from SharePoint, Confluence, Jira, and the intranet.
Worked on multi-agent systems for AEM, Pega, Tungsten document processing, and mainframe modernization.

experience.title: Founding Software Engineer
bullets: Built core AI workflows ingesting Canvas LMS content into class-scoped knowledge bases for chat and study generation.
Engineered adaptive RAG pipelines across MongoDB, Zilliz/Milvus, S3, Gemini Files API, and SSE streaming with citations and token-budgeting.
Built a distributed course-wiki engine with tenant-isolated background builds via SQS, MongoDB leases, Redis rate limiting, and AWS ECS.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Built a Rutgers academic-planning platform with thousands of users for degree, schedule, and class planning.
Architected a Python+LLM ingestion pipeline indexing 2,500+ classes and 500+ degree programs for real-time querying.
Shipped a production AI assistant with streaming tool-calling and grounded retrieval across Web, ChatGPT, Claude, and iOS.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
bullets: Built an agentic scraping system with OpenAI/Gemini structured outputs across 100,000+ nonprofit sites, cutting manual entry 90%.
Built a React/TypeScript/PostgreSQL search engine indexing 35,000+ volunteer opportunities with semantic search + hallucination filters.

research.lab: Algorithmic Robotics and Control Lab (Prof. Jingjin Yu)
research.title: Research Assistant

defaults.salary_expectation: Open / flexible — targeting market rate for the role
defaults.notice_period: Available per offer terms (current commitments are flexible)

eeo.veteran_status: I am not a protected veteran
eeo._note: Left null on purpose. EEO is optional and self-reported — never auto-fill; route to manual review.

question_bank.pattern: why (are|do) you (want|interested)|why (this|our|the) (role|company|position)|why do you want to work
cover letter|additional information|tell us (more|about)|anything else|why should we

question_bank.answer: Open / flexible — targeting market rate for the role

authorized to work|work authorization|legally authorized|eligible to work
willing to relocate|able to relocate|open to relocation
